name: Exa Search
bodyHint: Web search. Body: {"query": string, "numResults": 1-5}. Pick any interesting real-world topic.

name: Exa Answer
bodyHint: AI-powered answer to a question. Body: {"query": string}. Ask any factual question.

mockBody.query: What is the capital of Japan?

name: Firecrawl Search
bodyHint: Web search. Body: {"query": string}. Pick any topic.

name: Firecrawl Scrape
bodyHint: Scrape one URL to markdown. Body: {"url": string}. Use a well-known public URL like https://example.com or a news homepage.

name: Parallel Search
bodyHint: Web search. Body: {"objective": string}. State a short search objective.

mockBody.objective: Find recent developments in stablecoin payments

name: fal FLUX schnell (image)
bodyHint: Fast text-to-image. Body: {"prompt": string}. Describe any creative image.

mockBody.prompt: a calm sunrise over rice terraces, watercolor
